title: Anna's Marathon Chicken Bake
ingredients: 1/2 cups mint or cilantro leaves, torn
instructions: Season chicken with salt and pepper
Combine 3/4 cup yogurt, 2 Tbs lemon juice, 1 tsp turmeric and 2 Tbs of water in a large bowl. Season well, it should be on the salty side as it is a marinade. Add the chicken and toss to coat evenly.
Let sit for at least 30mins at room temp or overnight in the fridge.
Combine chickpeas, fennel seeds, cumin, remaining turmeric and red onion slices. Drizzle with olive oil, salt and pepper, toss to coat and place around the outside edges of the baking sheet.

Scrape any excess marinade off the chicken and place the chicken thighs in the middle of the tray. Bake in oven, tossing the chickpeas occasionally, until the skin on the chicken is evenly browned and the chickpeas are golden. This takes approx. 40mins.
Combine remaining yogurt with the remaining 1 Tbs lemon juice and season. Serve dish with brown rice and yogurt sauce, add fresh mint or cilantro.
notes: Two-column layout from sister-in-law's cookbook. Has margin photos and handwritten page numbers.
